process.title:
From metrics to decisions.
From tracking to results.
process.subtitle: Guided implementation to ensure real impact. Four steps for your team to move from reporting to acting.

steps.demo_desc: We walk through the executive dashboard, deviation detection and scenario simulator with a case close to your operation.
steps.survey_desc: We validate users, areas, KPIs, security, SSO and integrations to define the real implementation scope.
steps.impl_desc: Guided onboarding with support until the team operates with full autonomy.
steps.decide_desc: With reliable data, full traceability and centralized context, management intervenes before problems escalate.

features.title: Everything you need to manage KPIs seriously
features.subtitle: From data capture to executive reports, we cover the entire lifecycle of your indicators.
features.dashboard_desc: View the status of all your KPIs in an organizational traffic light. Green, yellow and red to understand priorities without opening multiple reports.
features.outlier_desc: The system automatically detects atypical values using statistical z-score and alerts before approving suspicious data.
features.checkins_desc: Three quick questions every week to capture progress, blockers and focus. Leaders gain context without adding meetings.
features.integrations_desc: Connect Google Sheets, REST APIs or CSV files so KPIs update according to the operational calendar you define.
features.simulator_desc: Test changes in key KPIs and estimate how they impact the overall team or company status.
features.marketplace_desc: Start from import-ready KPIs and accelerate implementation with structures already designed for different areas.
features.pdf_desc: Generate reports with automatic narrative for management, committees and follow-up meetings.
features.security_desc: Roles, MFA, SSO, full audit and protected credentials to operate with corporate standards.

pricing.title: Designed to adapt to your structure
pricing.subtitle: Guided implementation to ensure real impact. Activation is coordinated with a prior demo based on users, integrations and security requirements.
pricing.note: Purchase and access are managed with the commercial team after the demo.

plans.starter_desc: For small teams that want to organize their KPIs with an agile implementation.
plans.pro_desc: For organizations that need full visibility and operational automation.
plans.pro_f6: Google Sheets, REST and CSV integrations
plans.enterprise_desc: For complex structures with higher security and support requirements.

testimonials.title: What the teams that already use it say
testimonials.t1_quote: We used to spend hours putting together the monthly KPI report. Now we have it in one click with the executive PDF. The traffic light dashboard changed how the entire management sees the numbers.
testimonials.t2_quote: The outlier detection saved us from approving incorrect data at least three times in the first month. The system flags the anomaly before it reaches curation.
testimonials.t3_quote: The weekly check-ins changed the team culture. Before, nobody reported anything — now we have context from every area every week without extra meetings.

faq.title: Everything you want to know
faq.q1: Can I import my existing KPIs?
faq.a1: Yes. The marketplace includes import-ready templates and you can also create custom KPIs with your own formulas from the configuration module.
faq.q2: How does the Google Sheets integration work?
faq.a2: You configure the sheet URL, cell range and update frequency. The system automatically reads the value and records it as a measurement for the corresponding KPI.
faq.a3: Each instance is single-tenant: one company, one database, no data mixing. That guarantees isolation and operational control.
faq.q4: What happens if a collaborator proposes an unusually high or low value?
faq.a4: The system calculates the z-score of the value against the history and shows a visual warning before the leader approves. For small samples it uses percentage deviation.
faq.q5: How do I request a demo and proceed with the purchase?
faq.a5: We schedule a demo, survey the number of users, integrations and security requirements, and then put together the commercial proposal and implementation.
